milestones:
Focused on building a scalable ”App Store for Robotics,” enabling modular deployment of autonomous ”missions”
like parking reinforcement.
Built & deployed a microservice utilizing customer data to send personalized product recommendations via automated printable flyers, saving marketing workload for the business team.

Co-authored a high-performance supplier price list document parsing and normalization system that translates inconsistent formats, slangs, and abbreviations into structured data using vectorized operations.

Led end-to-end development of a 'operations snapshot' page in the admin portal, spanning requirements
gathering and technical specification writing, UI/UX design in Figma, and full implementation in React.

Implemented two-factor authentication for the admin portal using the AWS Cognito SDK, improving platform
security and access control.

Investigated ”Cultural Hallucinations” in Large Language Models (LLMs), identifying performance degradation and factual inaccuracies caused by low-resource language training data in Gujarati and Tamil.
Evaluated and benchmarked cross-lingual cultural awareness across state-of-the-art models including Gemini 2.5 Flash, Qwen-MT-Plus, and Llama 4 Maverick.
Collaborated on a comparative analysis framework to quantify how regional nuances and cultural contexts are lost or substituted by dominant western datasets during inference.
